SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF MARTIN HUIZAR IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE #300563 . DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.
